creator: me@cschwarz.com
text:
The port databases/mariadb100-server is out of date.

Furthermore, several CVEs have been issued on versions < 10.0.25 [1].


Please update the port and consider merging it back to quarterly.

[1] https://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/8c2b2f11-0ebe-11e6-b55e-b499baebfeaf.html
